function GetGitSoundID(GithubSnd, SoundName)
	SoundName = tostring(SoundName)
	local url = GithubSnd
	local FileName = SoundName
	writefile("customObject_Sound_"..FileName..".mp3", game:HttpGet(url))
	return (getcustomasset or getsynasset)("customObject_Sound_"..FileName..".mp3")
end

function sfx(id, parent, duration)
	local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
	sound.SoundId = id  
	sound.Parent = parent
	sound.Volume = 2  
	sound:Play()

	task.spawn(function()
		local fadeTime = 3
		local startFadeAt = math.max((duration or sound.TimeLength) - fadeTime, 0)

		task.wait(startFadeAt)

		local startVolume = sound.Volume
		local steps = 30

		for i = 1, steps do
			if not sound.Parent then return end
			sound.Volume = startVolume * (1 - (i / steps))
			task.wait(fadeTime / steps)
		end

		sound.Volume = 0
	end)

	game.Debris:AddItem(sound, duration or 4)
	return sound
end

function getsfxid(id)
	local hi = nil
	if id == "clang" then
		hi = "rbxassetid://495135507"
	elseif id == "finalride" then
		local url = "https://github.com/anhubuniversal-create/Obfuscation-/raw/refs/heads/main/kj-final-ride-theme-made-with-Voicemod.mp3"
		hi = GetGitSoundID(url, "Theme")
	end
	return tostring(hi)
end

sfx(getsfxid("finalride"), workspace, 11)
Wait(0.2)
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

-- wait for character to fully load
character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- Color correction (black/red flash)
local colorEffect = Instance.new("ColorCorrectionEffect")
colorEffect.TintColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0) -- red tint
colorEffect.Contrast = 1
colorEffect.Brightness = -0.3
colorEffect.Saturation = -1
colorEffect.Parent = Lighting

-- Highlight (red glow)
local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(120, 0, 0)
highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
highlight.FillTransparency = 0.2
highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
highlight.Parent = character

task.wait(0.01)

colorEffect:Destroy()
highlight:Destroy()
wait(0.01)
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

-- wait for character to fully load
character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- Color correction (black/red flash)
local colorEffect = Instance.new("ColorCorrectionEffect")
colorEffect.TintColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0) -- red tint
colorEffect.Contrast = 100
colorEffect.Brightness = -0.3
colorEffect.Saturation = -1
colorEffect.Parent = Lighting

-- Highlight (red glow)
local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
highlight.FillTransparency = 0.2
highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
highlight.Parent = character

task.wait(0.1)

colorEffect:Destroy()
highlight:Destroy()
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local character = Players.LocalPlayer.Character
local hum = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local hrp = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- store original states
local oldAutoRotate = hum.AutoRotate
local oldSit = hum.Sit

-- stop all animations
for _, v in ipairs(hum:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
	v:Stop(0)
end

-- disable physics control
hum.Sit = true
hum.AutoRotate = false
hum.PlatformStand = true

hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero

-- ghost mode
local originalCollisions = {}

local function setGhost(state)
	for _, obj in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
		if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
			if state then
				originalCollisions[obj] = obj.CanCollide
				obj.CanCollide = false
				obj.Massless = true
			else
				if originalCollisions[obj] ~= nil then
					obj.CanCollide = originalCollisions[obj]
				end
				obj.Massless = false
			end
		end
	end
end

setGhost(true)

-- animation (optional placeholder)
local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://0"
local track = hum:LoadAnimation(animation)
track:Play(1, 5, 1)
track:AdjustSpeed(0.01)

-- checkpoint target
local checkpoint = Instance.new("Part")
checkpoint.Size = hrp.Size
checkpoint.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
checkpoint.Anchored = true
checkpoint.CanCollide = false
checkpoint.Transparency = 1
checkpoint.Parent = workspace

-- YOUR FRAMES

	CFrame.new(164.498856,440.606720,25.364576,0.756493,0.179122,-0.628994,0.009351,0.958701,0.284262,0.653935,-0.220924,0.723576),
	CFrame.new(164.742188,440.643005,25.257961,0.650639,0.188219,-0.735692,0.028519,0.962057,0.271354,0.758852,-0.197535,0.620584),
	CFrame.new(165.111160,440.682678,25.108845,0.517826,0.130537,-0.845468,0.032213,0.984614,0.171750,0.854879,-0.116172,0.505654),
	CFrame.new(165.509125,440.723145,24.949928,0.369148,0.042776,-0.928386,0.014148,0.998566,0.051635,0.929263,-0.032196,0.368013)
}

-- transform helper
local origin = frames[1]:Inverse()
local startCFrame = hrp.CFrame

local function getRelative(cf)
	return startCFrame * (origin * cf)
end

-- FIXED SEQUENCE CONTROL
local index = 1
local t = 0
local speed = 20.2
local finished = false

local conn
conn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
	if finished then return end

	if index >= #frames then
		finished = true
		conn:Disconnect()

		track:Stop()

		-- stabilize before final tween
		hrp.Anchored = true
		hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
		hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero

		local tween = TweenService:Create(
			hrp,
			TweenInfo.new(0.1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{CFrame = checkpoint.CFrame}
		)

		tween:Play()
		tween.Completed:Wait()

		checkpoint:Destroy()

		-- restore state
		hrp.Anchored = false
		setGhost(false)

		hum.PlatformStand = false
		hum.Sit = oldSit
		hum.AutoRotate = oldAutoRotate

		return
	end

	t += dt * speed

	local a = getRelative(frames[index])
	local b = getRelative(frames[index + 1])

	local alpha = math.clamp(t, 0, 1)
	hrp.CFrame = a:Lerp(b, alpha)

	hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
	hrp.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero

	if t >= 1 then
		index += 1
		t = 0
	end
end)
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")

local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://129225170899725"

local animationTrack = humanoid:LoadAnimation(animation)

local fadeTime = 0.1
animationTrack:Play(fadeTime)
animationTrack.TimePosition = 0
animationTrack:AdjustSpeed(1)

task.delay(30, function()
    animationTrack:Stop(fadeTime)
end)
